summary: Frontend-only verification of Shops + Fuel categories, hidden order buttons, snappier shuffle reveal, and guided-flow interest cards. All requested flows work as intended.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is quite large; consider extracting mode-config (hero copy, chip label, empty-state) into a lookup map keyed by mode to reduce conditionals for Shops/Fuel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified against https://lucky-bite-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Mode tabs data-testids mode-food/drinks/bars/desserts/shops/fuel all present. ZIP input placeholder is 'e.g. 10001' (not 'ZIP'). Winner reveal detectable via 'Shuffle again' button appearing. Guided flow has intro modal — click [data-testid=guided-start] or wait for [data-testid=guided-flow] to detach after skip.
